Monitoring Monitoring Portal Site Clearance — simplified

Site Clearance — simplified model

Simplified model. Each discipline lead sets their own status; surveys and field notes attach as evidence that justifies the status — they don't derive it. Open a work area, then a discipline cell, to see the direct editor. (The full Map / Timeline / Activity tabs live on the rich variant.)

  • No Review Required

Evidence log 0

Surveys, field notes, relocations — the record that justifies the status. Append-only.
